milestones.name: Kickoff
milestones.description: Project kickoff — team aligned, scope locked

milestones.name: Requirements
milestones.description: All requirements documented and approved by stakeholders

milestones.name: Design Done
milestones.description: Wireframes, prototypes and visual designs approved

milestones.name: Backend Ready
milestones.description: Database, business logic and server deployed to staging

milestones.name: Frontend Built
milestones.description: All screens implemented and connected to mock APIs

milestones.name: APIs Ready
milestones.description: REST endpoints live, authenticated and documented

milestones.name: Integrated
milestones.description: Frontend fully wired to production-grade backend services

milestones.name: QA Passed
milestones.description: All test cases passed, zero critical open bugs

milestones.name: Launch
milestones.description: App live on production — App Store and Play Store

activities.name: UX Design
activities.description: User flows, wireframes and high-fidelity mockups

activities.name: Backend Dev
activities.description: Database schema, business logic, auth and infrastructure

activities.name: Frontend Dev
activities.description: React Native screens, navigation and state management

activities.name: API Layer
activities.description: REST endpoints, rate limiting, versioning and OpenAPI docs

activities.name: UI Integration
activities.description: Replace mock data with live API calls, handle error states

activities.name: Svc Integration
activities.description: Integration tests, service mesh config and contract validation

activities.name: System Testing
activities.description: End-to-end test execution, performance tests and bug triage

activities.name: Release Prep
activities.description: App store submission, infrastructure hardening and go-live runbook
